doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The claimed large positive effects for learning-styles-matched instruction directly contradict the established scientific consensus and multiple authoritative reviews showing no credible evidence for this approach.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This purports to be a 2025 meta-analysis showing large positive effects for learning-styles-matched instruction, contradicting the well-established scientific consensus that learning styles lack empirical support and multiple authoritative reviews showing no credible evidence for matching instruction to learning styles.
